name: Samchully Co.,Ltd
summary: Samchully Co., Ltd. produces and supplies electric power to electricity sellers on the electric power market in Korea. It is also involved in the compressed natural gas (CNG) fueling stations for natural gas vehicles, and energy consulting businesses. In addition, the company generates and supplies electricity for heating and cooling systems. Further, the company engages in fuel cell, biogas, and renewable energy businesses. As of December 31, 2019, it supplied 3.88 billion m city gas to approximately 3.23 million households with a pipeline network of 6,341 km in 13 cities of Gyeonggi-do province, as well as in the 5 districts of Incheon, as well as operated approximately twelve CNG fueling stations. The company was formerly known as Samchully Industry Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Samchully Co., Ltd. in October 1984. Samchully Co., Ltd. was founded in 1955 and is headquartered in Seoul, South Korea.
